calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Vacated

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted on PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY's MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, as follows:

Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion for entry of consent judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

The Court signed the proposed order and consent judgment included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
